phrases.english: When everything fails, remember this.
phrases.spanish: Cuando todo falla, recuerda esto.

phrases.english: Stop believing this lie about hope.
phrases.spanish: Deja de creer esta mentira sobre esperanza.

phrases.english: The dawn always comes after darkness.
phrases.spanish: El amanecer siempre llega después oscuridad.

phrases.english: What keeps me going when quitting.
phrases.spanish: Lo que me mantiene siguiendo cuando rindo.

phrases.english: Your breakthrough is closer than think.
phrases.spanish: Tu avance está más cerca piensas.

phrases.english: Stop waiting, small steps win.
phrases.spanish: Deja de esperar, los pasos pequeños ganan.

phrases.english: Never quit, progress is messy.
phrases.spanish: Nunca te rindas, el progreso es desordenado.

phrases.english: This is why, tiny wins multiply.
phrases.spanish: Por eso, las pequeñas victorias se multiplican.

phrases.english: The secret, show up anyway.
phrases.spanish: El secreto, preséntate de todas maneras.

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, persistence pays.
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie dice, la persistencia paga.

phrases.english: Stop comparing, celebrate your pace
phrases.spanish: Deja de compararte, celebra tu ritmo

phrases.english: Never settle, chase small wins
phrases.spanish: Nunca te conformes, busca pequeñas victorias

phrases.english: This is why, joy is simple
phrases.spanish: Por eso, la alegría es simple

phrases.english: The secret, rest fuels resilience
phrases.spanish: El secreto, descansar alimenta la resiliencia

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, start imperfect
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, empieza imperfecto

phrases.english: Stop, speak before you're perfect
phrases.spanish: Para, habla antes de ser perfecto

phrases.english: Never, apologize for practicing
phrases.spanish: Nunca, te disculpes por practicar

phrases.english: This is why, mistakes teach fluency
phrases.spanish: Por eso, los errores enseñan fluidez

phrases.english: The secret, say it wrong, confidently
phrases.spanish: El secreto, dilo mal, con confianza

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, nerves help
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, los nervios ayudan

phrases.english: Stop doubting, say one sentence
phrases.spanish: Deja de dudar, di una frase

phrases.english: Never fear, your accent shows growth
phrases.spanish: Nunca temas, tu acento crece

phrases.english: This is why, practice beats perfection
phrases.spanish: Por eso, la práctica vence a la perfección

phrases.english: The secret, five minutes daily matters
phrases.spanish: El secreto, cinco minutos diarios cuentan

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, pause then repeat
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, pausa, repite

phrases.english: Stop, speak, surprise yourself today
phrases.spanish: Para, habla, sorpréndete hoy

phrases.english: Never, hide your Spanish voice
phrases.spanish: Nunca, ocultes tu voz en español

phrases.english: This is why, verbs start dancing
phrases.spanish: Por eso, los verbos empiezan a bailar

phrases.english: The secret, tiny phrases beat textbooks
phrases.spanish: El secreto, las frases pequeñas vencen a los libros

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, say nonsense first
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, di tonterías primero

phrases.english: Stop, say one word today
phrases.spanish: Para, di una palabra hoy

phrases.english: Stop, say it out loud
phrases.spanish: Para, dilo en voz alta

phrases.english: Stop, master one phrase today
phrases.spanish: Para, domina una frase hoy

phrases.english: Stop, send a voice message
phrases.spanish: Para, manda un mensaje de voz

phrases.english: Never, be shy speaking
phrases.spanish: Nunca, seas tímido al hablar

phrases.english: Stop, say the wrong thing, laugh
phrases.spanish: Para, di algo mal, ríe

phrases.english: Never, translate every word, please
phrases.spanish: Nunca, traduzcas cada palabra, por favor

phrases.english: This is why, one word changes conversations
phrases.spanish: Por eso, una palabra cambia conversaciones

phrases.english: The secret, steal native phrases, repeat
phrases.spanish: El secreto, copia frases nativas, repite

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, listen, imitate
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, escucha, imita

phrases.english: Stop, forgive to free yourself
phrases.spanish: Detente, perdona para liberarte

phrases.english: Never, skip forgiving yourself
phrases.spanish: Nunca, dejes de perdonarte

phrases.english: This is why, forgiving heals faster
phrases.spanish: Por esto, perdonar sana más rápido

phrases.english: The secret, let go without judgment
phrases.spanish: El secreto, suelta sin juzgar

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, forgiving frees you
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie dice, perdonar te libera

phrases.english: Stop, cancel that inner trial
phrases.spanish: Para, cancela ese juicio interno

phrases.english: Never, carry yesterday's grudge again
phrases.spanish: Nunca, cargues el rencor de ayer

phrases.english: This is why, forgiving wins silently
phrases.spanish: Por eso, perdonar gana en silencio

phrases.english: The secret, say sorry to yourself
phrases.spanish: El secreto, discúlpate contigo mismo

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, small forgiveness changes
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie dice, perdonar cambia todo

phrases.english: Stop whispering, speak Spanish loudly
phrases.spanish: Deja de susurrar, habla español fuerte

phrases.english: Never wait for perfect pronunciation
phrases.spanish: Nunca esperes la pronunciación perfecta

phrases.english: This is why natives smile at you
phrases.spanish: Por eso los nativos te sonríen

phrases.english: The secret, mimic rhythm, sound native
phrases.spanish: El secreto, imita el ritmo, suena nativo

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, one phrase connects
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, una frase conecta

phrases.english: Stop, say one brave sentence
phrases.spanish: Para, di una frase valiente

phrases.english: Never, fear your imperfect voice
phrases.spanish: Nunca, temas tu voz imperfecta

phrases.english: This is why, small talks matter
phrases.spanish: Por eso, las pequeñas charlas importan

phrases.english: The secret, laugh at your mistakes
phrases.spanish: El secreto, ríete de tus errores

phrases.english: Stop, trade fear for one word
phrases.spanish: Para, cambia miedo por una palabra

phrases.english: Stop, scrolling, breathe five seconds
phrases.spanish: Deja de desplazarte, respira cinco segundos

phrases.english: Never judge, feel the moment
phrases.spanish: Nunca juzgues, siente el momento

phrases.english: The secret, listen to your heartbeat
phrases.spanish: El secreto, escucha tu corazón

phrases.english: What nobody tells you, rest is progress
phrases.spanish: Lo que nadie te dice, descansar es progreso

phrases.english: Stop multitasking, taste this moment
phrases.spanish: Deja las multitareas, saborea este instante

phrases.english: Never lose faith. This too shall pass.
phrases.spanish: Nunca pierdas fe. Esto también pasará.

phrases.english: Stop scrolling. This is your sign.
phrases.spanish: Deja desplazarte. Esta tu señal.

phrases.english: You needed hear this today.
phrases.spanish: Necesitabas escuchar esto hoy.

phrases.english: This is your wake-up call.
phrases.spanish: Esta es tu llamada atención.

phrases.english: Don't skip. This changes everything.
phrases.spanish: No saltes. Esto cambia todo.

phrases.english: Stop, speak like you belong
phrases.spanish: Para, habla como si pertenecieras

phrases.english: Never mute your Spanish spark
phrases.spanish: Nunca apagues tu chispa en español

phrases.english: This is why, mistakes impress natives
phrases.spanish: Por eso, los errores impresionan a nativos

phrases.english: The secret, say less, mean more
phrases.spanish: El secreto, di menos, comunica más

phrases.english: Stop fearing weird accents, own them
phrases.spanish: Deja de temer acentos raros, hazlos tuyos
